✦ About Me ✦

Hi, I'm Abigail!

Photography has been part of my life since fourth grade — that's when I got my first camera, one I still have to this day. My love for it started with my grandfather, who was always behind a lens. I grew up surrounded by his photos, mostly landscapes, and the way he saw the world through a camera never left me.

For me, photography is about seeing God's creation through a different perspective — capturing beauty in real, everyday moments in a way that lasts forever. I love the whole process, from getting to know the people I work with to the editing room where a photo really comes alive.

I'm based in Fort Worth, TX and shoot seniors, couples, families, and really anyone who wants beautiful photos that actually feel like them. I'm currently offering portfolio-friendly rates as I grow — so now is the perfect time to reach out!

— Abigail
Let's Work Together

What I offer

🎓

Senior Portraits

Celebrate your senior year with golden hour magic, wildflower fields, and photos that actually look like you.

🤍

Couples

Candid, romantic, real. Whether it's a date night or an engagement, I capture the in-between moments.

👨‍👩‍👧

Families

Fun, relaxed sessions that feel like your family — not a stock photo. Kids and pets always welcome.

✨

Individuals

Solo sessions for content, personal branding, or just because you deserve beautiful photos of yourself.
